title: [Comb] Xor canonicalizer can result in a crash
body:
Consider the following:

``` mlir
hw.module private @Foo(in %a : i6, in %b : i2, in %c : i27) {
  %c-1_i35 = hw.constant -1 : i35
  %0 = comb.concat %a, %c, %b : i6, i27, i2
  %wire = hw.wire %0  : i35
  %1 = comb.xor bin %wire, %c-1_i35 : i35
  %2 = comb.extract %1 from 34 : (i35) -> i1
  %3 = comb.extract %1 from 26 : (i35) -> i1
  hw.output
}
```

When canonicalized, this will produce the following crash:

```
# ../../../build-debug/bin/circt-opt -canonicalize reduced.final.mlir 
Assertion failed: (detail::isPresent(Val) && "dyn_cast on a non-existent value"), function dyn_cast, file Casting.h, line 656.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: ../../../build-debug/bin/circt-opt -canonicalize reduced.final.mlir
 #0 0x0000000102e99100 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x100301100)
 #1 0x0000000102e996f8 PrintStackTraceSignalHandler(void*) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x1003016f8)
 #2 0x0000000102e96d20 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x1002fed20)
 #3 0x0000000102e9b77c SignalHandler(int, __siginfo*, void*) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x10030377c)
 #4 0x000000019fb5d6a4 (/usr/lib/system/libsystem_platform.dylib+0x1804ad6a4)
 #5 0x000000019fb23848 (/usr/lib/system/libsystem_pthread.dylib+0x180473848)
 #6 0x000000019fa2c9e4 (/usr/lib/system/libsystem_c.dylib+0x18037c9e4)
 #7 0x000000019fa2bc18 (/usr/lib/system/libsystem_c.dylib+0x18037bc18)
 #8 0x00000001033bb0f8 decltype(auto) llvm::dyn_cast<circt::comb::ReplicateOp, mlir::Operation>(mlir::Operation*) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x1008230f8)
 #9 0x00000001033baec8 circt::comb::SextMatcher<mlir::detail::AnyCapturedValueMatcher>::match(mlir::Operation*) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x100822ec8)
#10 0x00000001033bada8 std::__1::enable_if<llvm::is_detected<mlir::detail::has_compatible_matcher_t, circt::comb::SextMatcher<mlir::detail::AnyCapturedValueMatcher>, mlir::Operation*>::value, bool>::type mlir::detail::matchOperandOrValueAtIndex<circt::comb::SextMatcher<mlir::detail::AnyCapturedValueMatcher>>(mlir::Operation*, unsigned int, circt::comb::SextMatcher<mlir::detail::AnyCapturedValueMatcher>&) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x100822da8)
#11 0x00000001033bad3c (anonymous namespace)::ComplementMatcher<circt::comb::SextMatcher<mlir::detail::AnyCapturedValueMatcher>>::match(mlir::Operation*) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x100822d3c)
#12 0x0000000103397388 bool mlir::matchPattern<(anonymous namespace)::ComplementMatcher<circt::comb::SextMatcher<mlir::detail::AnyCapturedValueMatcher>>>(mlir::Value, (anonymous namespace)::ComplementMatcher<circt::comb::SextMatcher<mlir::detail::AnyCapturedValueMatcher>> const&) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x1007ff388)
#13 0x0000000103396c84 circt::comb::XorOp::canonicalize(circt::comb::XorOp, mlir::PatternRewriter&) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-debug/bin/circt-opt+0x1007fec84)
```

There's a problem in the `SextMatcher` that is doing a `signBits.getDefiningOp()` when there might not be a defining op, assumedly the port in the example above.
